title: Scholarship Calendar
html:
Operational tracker of every scholarship Yahir was juggling in early 2023: al forthan (Feb 6), ford family foundation (March 1), uo diversity excellence (Feb 1), redwood foundation (Feb 3), osac scholarship, renaissance scholarship, plus IDA strategy via project youth plus.

TL;DR

  • Confirms ford family foundation was THE priority — flagged with "!!!!!!!!!!" in source.
  • Names diana hoff as the contact for the Renaissance "siblings on different FAFSA" coordination with valeria.
  • IDA mechanic: every $1 contributed gets matched 3:1 — Yahir planned to funnel Redwood scholarship money into IDA if Ford came through.
  • criswell scholarship, Elmer & Iva Gilmore, Grange Coop, Manuel Garcia listed as Redwood-affiliated targets.

college application arc · al forthan · ford family foundation · redwood foundation · uo diversity excellence · ida savings account · valeria
